one_time_description: Valuation loss on investments ($4,251,027), loss due to alleged fraud ($2,135,172), partially offset by gain on disposal of capital assets ($519,947)
economic_notes: Operates in fisheries, gaming, tobacco retail, rental properties, aquaculture, wind energy partnership, hotel partnership, and various commercial operations. Alleged fraud occurred during current and prior year (Note 26). COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
notes: Prior year restated with correction of error of $6,041,813 (Note 29). Alleged fraud disclosed in Note 26 affecting current and prior year. Large valuation loss on investments of $4,251,027. Financial statements signed February 2022 for March 31, 2020 year-end — significant delay. Two entities accounted for by modified equity method (We'Kopekwitk Service Hotel Limited Partnership and Truro Millbrook Wind Limited Partnership). Millbrook First Nation Children's Trust excluded from consolidation. Current liabilities calculated as bank indebtedness $5,000,000 + accounts payable $2,526,284 + term loans due on demand $565,222 + deferred revenue $275,213. Prior accumulated surplus is restated figure of $58,481,337.
